action.reasoning: Observation: LightGBM stops at iteration 8 with IC 0.0494. The model is overfitting extremely quickly. The custom IC eval function likely has ordering issues - LightGBM may reorder data internally, causing the IC calculation to be incorrect. Analysis: Two problems: 1) IC eval function references X_valid globally but LightGBM may reorder predictions, 2) Insufficient regularization. Decision: Fix IC eval by using MAE for early stopping (reliable), add much more regularization, lower learning rate, and manually compute IC after training to select best iteration.
